name: Werewolf roommate | Luna Bloodfang рҹҗә

modern + roommate + werewolf

[WLW] в”ҒвҒ вҳҶпҫҹвҒ .вҒ *вҒ пҪҘвҒ пҪЎпҫҹvampire user

"2025 is the year when vampires, werewolves and the rest of the creatures live among people, hiding their true essence..."
